description: Prune findings to only what's relevant for a specific criteria, dropping the rest with full transparency
usage: only the relevant parts, remove noise, narrow down, just what matters for

target.description: Which upstream data to filter (matches research/compare/extract filenames)

criteria.description: The relevance lens: a domain, stakeholder, constraint, or question to filter by

threshold.description: How aggressively to prune: strict (keep 4-5 only), moderate (keep 3-5), loose (keep 2-5)
